lines.english: Lesson 28
lines.chinese: 第28课
lines.raw: Lesson 28 | 第28课

lines.english: Five pounds too dear
lines.chinese: 五镑也嫌贵
lines.raw: Five pounds too dear | 五镑也嫌贵

lines.english: Why was even five pounds 'too dear' ?
lines.chinese: 为什么连五镑也“嫌贵”？
lines.raw: Why was even five pounds 'too dear' ? | 为什么连五镑也“嫌贵”？

lines.english: Small boats loaded with wares sped to the great liner as she was entering the harbour.
lines.chinese: 当那艘巨型客轮驶进港口的时候，许多装载着货品的小船疾驶着向它靠拢。
lines.raw: Small boats loaded with wares sped to the great liner as she was entering the harbour. | 当那艘巨型客轮驶进港口的时候，许多装载着货品的小船疾驶着向它靠拢。

lines.english: Before she had anchored, the men from the boats had climbed on board
lines.chinese: 没等船停稳，小船上的人就爬上了客轮。
lines.raw: Before she had anchored, the men from the boats had climbed on board | 没等船停稳，小船上的人就爬上了客轮。

lines.english: and the decks were soon covered with colourful rugs from Persia,
lines.chinese: 甲板上很快就摆满了：来自波斯的五光十色的地毯、
lines.raw: and the decks were soon covered with colourful rugs from Persia, | 甲板上很快就摆满了：来自波斯的五光十色的地毯、

lines.english: silks from India, copper coffee pots, and beautiful handmade silverware.
lines.chinese: 印度的丝绸、铜咖啡壶以及制作精美的手工银器。
lines.raw: silks from India, copper coffee pots, and beautiful handmade silverware. | 印度的丝绸、铜咖啡壶以及制作精美的手工银器。

lines.english: It was difficult not to be tempted.
lines.chinese: 谁都很难不为之所动。
lines.raw: It was difficult not to be tempted. | 谁都很难不为之所动。

lines.english: Many of the tourists on board had begun bargaining with the tradesmen,
lines.chinese: 船上许多游客已和小贩们讨价还价起来，
lines.raw: Many of the tourists on board had begun bargaining with the tradesmen, | 船上许多游客已和小贩们讨价还价起来，

lines.english: but I decided not to buy anything until I had disembarked.
lines.chinese: 而我却决定不买任何东西，直到下船为止。
lines.raw: but I decided not to buy anything until I had disembarked. | 而我却决定不买任何东西，直到下船为止。

lines.english: I had no sooner got off the ship than I was assailed by a man who wanted to sell me a diamond ring.
lines.chinese: 我刚一下船，就受到一个要向我兜售钻石戒指的人的纠缠。
lines.raw: I had no sooner got off the ship than I was assailed by a man who wanted to sell me a diamond ring. | 我刚一下船，就受到一个要向我兜售钻石戒指的人的纠缠。

lines.english: I had no intention of buying one,
lines.chinese: 我根本不想买钻石戒指，
lines.raw: I had no intention of buying one, | 我根本不想买钻石戒指，

lines.english: but I could not conceal the fact that I was impressed by the size of the diamonds.
lines.chinese: 但我不得不承认我还是给那些钻石的大小留下了深刻的印象。
lines.raw: but I could not conceal the fact that I was impressed by the size of the diamonds. | 但我不得不承认我还是给那些钻石的大小留下了深刻的印象。

lines.english: Some of them were as big as marbles.
lines.chinese: 有些钻石大得像弹子。
lines.raw: Some of them were as big as marbles. | 有些钻石大得像弹子。

lines.english: The man went to great lengths to prove that the diamonds were real.
lines.chinese: 那个人竭力证明他的钻石是真的。
lines.raw: The man went to great lengths to prove that the diamonds were real. | 那个人竭力证明他的钻石是真的。

lines.english: As we were walking past a shop, he held a diamond firmly against the window and made a deep impression in the glass.
lines.chinese: 当我们走过一家商店的时候，他把一枚钻石使劲地抵在橱窗上，在玻璃上划出了一道深痕。
lines.raw: As we were walking past a shop, he held a diamond firmly against the window and made a deep impression in the glass. | 当我们走过一家商店的时候，他把一枚钻石使劲地抵在橱窗上，在玻璃上划出了一道深痕。

lines.english: It took me over half an hour to get rid of him.
lines.chinese: 我花了半个多小时才摆脱了他。
lines.raw: It took me over half an hour to get rid of him. | 我花了半个多小时才摆脱了他。

lines.english: The next man to approach me was selling expensive pens and watches.
lines.chinese: 第二个向我走来的人是卖高档钢笔和手表的。
lines.raw: The next man to approach me was selling expensive pens and watches. | 第二个向我走来的人是卖高档钢笔和手表的。

lines.english: I examined one of the pens closely. It certainly looked genuine.
lines.chinese: 我仔细地察看了一支钢笔。它看上去确实是真品。
lines.raw: I examined one of the pens closely. It certainly looked genuine. | 我仔细地察看了一支钢笔。它看上去确实是真品。

lines.english: At the base of the gold cap, the words 'made in the U.S.A.' had been neatly inscribed.
lines.chinese: 在金笔帽的底部，刻有“美国制造”的字样。
lines.raw: At the base of the gold cap, the words 'made in the U.S.A.' had been neatly inscribed. | 在金笔帽的底部，刻有“美国制造”的字样。

lines.english: The man said that the pen was worth ￡50, but as a special favour, he would let me have it for ￡30.
lines.chinese: 那人说这支笔值50镑，但作为特别优惠，他愿以30镑卖给我。
lines.raw: The man said that the pen was worth ￡50, but as a special favour, he would let me have it for ￡30. | 那人说这支笔值50镑，但作为特别优惠，他愿以30镑卖给我。

lines.english: I shook my head and held up five fingers indicating that I was willing to pay ￡5.
lines.chinese: 我摇了摇头，伸出5个手指，表示我愿付5镑。
lines.raw: I shook my head and held up five fingers indicating that I was willing to pay ￡5. | 我摇了摇头，伸出5个手指，表示我愿付5镑。

lines.english: Gesticulating wildly, the man acted as if he found my offer outrageous,
lines.chinese: 那人狂乱地打着手势，装出我的出价不可思议的样子，
lines.raw: Gesticulating wildly, the man acted as if he found my offer outrageous, | 那人狂乱地打着手势，装出我的出价不可思议的样子，

lines.english: but he eventually reduced the price to 10 pounds.
lines.chinese: 但最终还是把价格降到了10镑。
lines.raw: but he eventually reduced the price to 10 pounds. | 但最终还是把价格降到了10镑。

lines.english: Shrugging my shoulders I began to walk away when,
lines.chinese: 我耸了耸肩膀，刚要走开，
lines.raw: Shrugging my shoulders I began to walk away when, | 我耸了耸肩膀，刚要走开，

lines.english: a moment later, he ran after me and thrust the pen into my hands.
lines.chinese: 片刻之后，他便追了上来，把钢笔塞到我手里。
lines.raw: a moment later, he ran after me and thrust the pen into my hands. | 片刻之后，他便追了上来，把钢笔塞到我手里。

lines.english: Though he kept throwing up his arms in despair, he readily accepted the ￡5 I gave him.
lines.chinese: 尽管他不停地绝望地挥舞着双臂，但他还是爽快地收下了我给他的5镑钱。
lines.raw: Though he kept throwing up his arms in despair, he readily accepted the ￡5 I gave him. | 尽管他不停地绝望地挥舞着双臂，但他还是爽快地收下了我给他的5镑钱。

lines.english: I felt especially pleased with my wonderful bargain--until I got back to the ship.
lines.chinese: 我对这笔了不起的交易特别满意——直到我回到船上。
lines.raw: I felt especially pleased with my wonderful bargain--until I got back to the ship. | 我对这笔了不起的交易特别满意——直到我回到船上。

lines.english: No matter how hard I tried,
lines.chinese: 无论我怎么努力，
lines.raw: No matter how hard I tried, | 无论我怎么努力，

lines.english: it was impossible to fill this beautiful pen with ink and to this day it has never written a single word!
lines.chinese: 也无法把墨水灌进这支漂亮的钢笔里，而且直到今天，它连一个字也没写出来过！
lines.raw: it was impossible to fill this beautiful pen with ink and to this day it has never written a single word! | 也无法把墨水灌进这支漂亮的钢笔里，而且直到今天，它连一个字也没写出来过！
